name: SwiftLM
description: ⚡ Native MLX Swift LLM inference server for Apple Silicon. OpenAI-compatible API, SSD streaming for 100B+ MoE models, TurboQuant KV cache compression, MACOS + iOS iPhone app.
summaryZh: ⚡ Native MLX Swift LLM inference server for Apple Silicon. OpenAI-compatible API, SSD streaming for 100B+ MoE models, TurboQuant KV cache compression, MACOS + iOS iPhone app. 它更偏底层推理和服务基础设施，适合关注性能、成本和部署效率。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
